features: All our botanical fragrances are crafted with ingredients Inspired by nature, carefully sourced in a way that respects our planet
Enjoy the invigorating and fresh scent of coconut milk and indonesian patchouli
Fragrance infused with natural essential oils
Naturally derived wax candle with metal free wick
description: Product description Experience the invigorating and fresh scent of Coconut Milk and Indonesian Patchouli with our Botanica Candle. Crafted with natural essential oils and free from phthalates, acetone, and dyes, this candle lasts up to 90 hours. Enjoy the exotic, tropical fragrance in a cream-colored, ceramic jar with a metal-free wick. Trim the wick before each use. Dimensions: 9.3 cm (W) x 12.7 cm (H), 18.6 cm diameter. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
